scripts.sync-docs-map: node -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import {fileURLToPath} from 'node:url'; import {dirname,join} from 'node:path'; const d=dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)); const root=join(d,'../..'); const map=join(d,'data/default.json'); fs.copyFileSync(map, join(root,'docs/public/workflow-map.json')); fs.copyFileSync(map, join(root,'apps/web/public/workflow-map.json')); fs.copyFileSync(join(root,'packages/ui/tokens.css'), join(root,'docs/public/styles/atom-tokens.css')); console.log('synced workflow-map.json → docs/public + apps/web/public; atom-tokens.css → docs/public/styles');"
